Event: The Fearless Adventure
Event Date: 29/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR378
Path Charmer Outfit

Once in a while, when the armor's wearer has their health drop below 30%, the armor's wearer and each allied unit in a small radius around remove 4 random negative effects from them, and gain a shield that blocks 70% damage of any type. The shield exists up to 5 sec. The armor's wearer and all allied units in a small radius around go into a frenzy. Their size increases, and all their stats are increased by 30% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
